task_completion.description: Log into the GNU Health system
task_completion.visual_evidence: The GNU Health client application is open and logged in.

task_completion.description: Open the patient record for Ana Betz
task_completion.visual_evidence: The patient record for 'Ana Isabel Betz' (or 'Ana Betz') is open and visible in the GNU Health GUI.

task_completion.description: Add family disease record for Father
task_completion.visual_evidence: A family disease or family history entry is visible in the patient's record showing the relative as 'Father' and the disease code as 'I25'.

task_completion.description: Add family disease record for Mother
task_completion.visual_evidence: A family disease or family history entry is visible in the patient's record showing the relative as 'Mother' and the disease code as 'E11'.

task_completion.description: Add family disease record for Sister
task_completion.visual_evidence: A family disease or family history entry is visible in the patient's record showing the relative as 'Sister' and the disease code as 'M32'.

task_completion.description: Save all family disease entries to the patient record
task_completion.visual_evidence: The family disease entries appear in a saved state within the patient record, indicated by the entries appearing in the persistent list view, a greyed-out save icon, or the absence of 'unsaved changes' indicators (like asterisks).

integrity.description: The agent used the GNU Health graphical interface to add the records
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the GNU Health GUI menus, tabs, and forms rather than a terminal window.

integrity.description: The agent did not use direct database commands to bypass the UI
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no terminal windows visible executing SQL queries (e.g., psql) or Python scripts to inject the records directly into the database.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the genuine application
integrity.visual_evidence: The visual evidence comes from the actual GNU Health application window, not a text editor or notes app where the agent simply typed out the required codes.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target patient's full name in the system is 'Ana Isabel Betz'. The required family disease records to verify are: Relative 'Father' with ICD-10 code 'I25', Relative 'Mother' with ICD-10 code 'E11', and Relative 'Sister' with ICD-10 code 'M32'.
